nasb.text: He spread the tent over the tabernacle and put the covering of the tent on top of it, just as the Lord had commanded Moses.

esv.text: And he spread the tent over the tabernacle and put the covering of the tent over it, as the Lord had commanded Moses.

cnv.text: 把罩棚鋪在帳幕上面，又把罩棚的上蓋放在上面；都是照著耶和華吩咐摩西的。

ccb.text: 在圣幕上面搭起罩棚，铺上顶盖，都遵照耶和华的吩咐。
